ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 优先对整个文档进行OCR识别

ast.source: Ocr only if text is poor

ast.name: addOption

ast.target: 自动：在文本层可靠时使用文本层

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to infer note path from cache
ast.target: 从缓存推断笔记路径失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CLI path for Docker or Podman (used to start Redis Stack and the Python worker). Leave as 'docker'/'podman' to auto-detect via PATH and common locations without saving an absolute path (keeps cross-OS sync). Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir.
ast.target: 用于启动Redis Stack和Python工作进程的Docker或Podman的CLI路径。保留为'docker'/'podman'可通过PATH和常见位置自动检测，无需保存绝对路径（保持跨操作系统同步）。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show legacy local interpreter/venv controls. Recommended to keep this disabled.
ast.target: 显示旧版本地解释器/虚拟环境控件。建议保持禁用状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Worker runtime is recommended. Enable advanced options to expose local interpreter/venv mode.
ast.target: 推荐使用工作进程运行时。启用高级选项以显示本地解释器/虚拟环境模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local mode only: optional path to the Python interpreter used to create or run the plugin env. Leave blank to auto-detect (python3.13/3.12/3.11/3.10/python3/python, or py on Windows). Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir.
ast.target: 仅限本地模式：用于创建或运行插件环境的Python解释器的可选路径。留空以自动检测（python3.13/3.12/3.11/3.10/python3/python，或Windows上的py）。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local mode: create or update the plugin's python env. Worker mode: managed by docker startup.
ast.target: 本地模式：创建或更新插件的Python环境。工作进程模式：由Docker启动管理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local mode only: shared user cache can be reused across vaults; plugin folder keeps a per-vault env.
ast.target: 仅限本地模式：共享用户缓存可在保险库之间重复使用；插件文件夹为每个保险库保留一个环境。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When starting redis stack, pick a free local port and update the redis URL.
ast.target: 启动Redis Stack时，选择一个空闲的本地端口并更新Redis URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional path to store Redis persistence when auto-assign is off. Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir; use ./ to keep it vault-relative.
ast.target: 当自动分配关闭时，用于存储Redis持久化的可选路径。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析；使用./使其相对于保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional docker/podman compose project name when auto-assign is off.
ast.target: 当自动分配关闭时，可选的Docker/Podman Compose项目名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave blank to use a per-vault cache under ~/.cache/zotero-redisearch-rag/. Set a path here to override it. Supports ~. Relative paths with separators resolve from your home dir; use ./ to keep it vault-relative.
ast.target: 留空以使用~/.cache/zotero-redisearch-rag/下的每个保险库缓存。在此处设置路径以覆盖它。支持~。带分隔符的相对路径从您的主目录解析；使用./使其相对于保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires Docker Desktop running and your vault path shared with Docker. Starts Redis and, in worker mode, the Python worker container.
ast.target: 需要Docker Desktop运行且您的保险库路径已与Docker共享。启动Redis，并在工作进程模式下启动Python工作进程容器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Starts or restarts redis stack (and python worker in worker mode).
ast.target: 启动或重启Redis Stack（以及工作进程模式下的Python工作进程）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local Zotero API base URL, e.g. HTTP://127.0.0.1:23119/API

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select your local library or a Zotero group library.
ast.target: 选择您的本地库或Zotero群组库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zotero Web API base URL for write fallback, e.g. https://api.zotero.org
ast.target: 用于写入回退的Zotero Web API基础URL，例如https://api.zotero.org

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Library type for web API writes.
ast.target: 用于Web API写入的库类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Numeric Zotero user/group ID for web API writes.
ast.target: 用于Web API写入的数字Zotero用户/群组ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zotero API key for write fallback (from Zotero.org).
ast.target: 用于写入回退的Zotero API密钥（来自Zotero.org）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for note YAML frontmatter. Use {{var}} placeholders; leave blank to omit.
ast.target: 笔记YAML前置元数据的模板。使用{{var}}占位符；留空则省略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Normalize Zotero tags for Obsidian (no spaces, punctuation trimmed).
ast.target: 为Obsidian规范化Zotero标签（无空格，标点已修剪）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for the note body after frontmatter. Use {{pdf_block}}, {{annotation_block}}, and {{docling_markdown}} placeholders.
ast.target: 前置元数据之后笔记正文的模板。使用{{pdf_block}}、{{annotation_block}}和{{docling_markdown}}占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where exported chat notes are stored (vault-relative).
ast.target: 导出的聊天笔记存储位置（相对于保险库）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional vault-relative template file for copied chat notes. Use {{chat_body}} to control where the transcript is inserted (otherwise template text is appended after the transcript).
ast.target: 用于复制聊天笔记的可选保险库相对模板文件。使用{{chat_body}}控制插入记录的位置（否则模板文本将附加在记录之后）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional command ID to run after the chat note is created and opened. Useful for templater workflows that need the full note body already present.
ast.target: 在聊天笔记创建并打开后运行的可选命令ID。适用于需要完整笔记正文已存在的模板工作流。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable to use Zotero storage paths directly. If a local file path is unavailable, the plugin temporarily copies the PDF into the vault for processing.
ast.target: 禁用以直接使用Zotero存储路径。如果本地文件路径不可用，插件会临时将PDF复制到保险库中进行处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When ocr is used, replace the vault PDF with a tesseract text layer (requires copy pdfs into vault).
ast.target: 使用OCR时，用Tesseract文本层替换保险库中的PDF（需要将PDF复制到保险库中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link citations to the Obsidian note when available; otherwise use Zotero deep links.
ast.target: 当可用时，将引文链接到 Obsidian 笔记；否则使用 Zotero 深度链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Label shown before the page link in annotation callouts.
ast.target: 在批注标注中，页面链接前显示的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Embed image/rect annotations as images in callouts when available.
ast.target: 当可用时，将图像/矩形批注作为图像嵌入标注中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch cached annotation images from a local Zotero companion plugin.
ast.target: 从本地 Zotero 伴侣插件获取缓存的批注图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local URL for the Zotero companion plugin (loopback only).
ast.target: Zotero 伴侣插件的本地 URL（仅限回环地址）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional shared token for the companion endpoint.
ast.target: 伴侣端点的可选共享令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create and paste a secure token. The generated token is copied to your clipboard. In Zotero, set your Zotero companion plugin token to this value.
ast.target: 创建并粘贴一个安全令牌。生成的令牌将复制到您的剪贴板。在 Zotero 中，将您的 Zotero 伴侣插件令牌设置为此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API token for paddleocr-vl / pp-structurev3 endpoints. Get a free API key at
ast.target: 用于 paddleocr-vl / pp-structurev3 端点的 API 令牌。在以下地址获取免费 API 密钥：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional override for the paddleocr-vl API endpoint.
ast.target: paddleocr-vl API 端点的可选覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API endpoint for pp-structurev3 (see baidu AI studio docs).
ast.target: pp-structurev3 的 API 端点（参见百度 AI Studio 文档）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the ocr engine to use when ocr is required.
ast.target: 选择需要 OCR 时使用的 OCR 引擎。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls when ocr runs; per-page behavior is configured separately below.
ast.target: 控制 OCR 何时运行；每页行为在下方单独配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force per-page ocr when ocr runs, bypassing layout heuristics; can be slower for multi-column pdfs.
ast.target: 当 OCR 运行时，强制对每页进行 OCR，绕过布局启发式；对于多列 PDF 可能较慢。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lower values are stricter; below this threshold the text is treated as low quality.
ast.target: 值越低越严格；低于此阈值的文本将被视为低质量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 删除此已保存的配置文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatic AI cleanup for poor ocr at import. Can be slow/costly.
ast.target: 导入时自动进行 AI 清理以处理低质量 OCR。可能较慢/成本较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a profile to populate base URL and API key.
ast.target: 选择一个配置文件以填充基础 URL 和 API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: OpenAI 兼容端点，例如 HTTP://127.0.0.1:1234/v1

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional API key for the cleanup endpoint.
ast.target: 清理端点的可选 API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a cleanup-capable model from the provider.
ast.target: 从提供商中选择一个支持清理的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically learn the best cleanup mode for the selected provider and model, and reprobe reasoning every 30 days.
ast.target: 自动学习所选提供商和模型的最佳清理模式，并每 30 天重新探测推理能力。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only run cleanup when chunk quality is below this threshold (0-1).
ast.target: 仅当块质量低于此阈值（0-1）时才运行清理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip cleanup for chunks longer than this limit.
ast.target: 跳过长度超过此限制的块的清理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select an embeddings model from the provider.
ast.target: 从提供商中选择一个嵌入模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prepend title/authors/tags/section info before embedding chunks.
ast.target: 在嵌入块之前添加标题/作者/标签/章节信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include neighboring chunk text around each chunk when embedding (0 disables).
ast.target: 在嵌入时包含每个块周围的相邻块文本（0 表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max chars per neighboring chunk included in embeddings.
ast.target: 嵌入中包含的每个相邻块的最大字符数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Split long chunks into smaller subchunks for embedding only (0 disables).
ast.target: 将长块拆分为更小的子块，仅用于嵌入（0 表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overlap between embedding subchunks to keep context intact.
ast.target: 嵌入子块之间的重叠，以保持上下文完整。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the ocr cleanup model to tag chunks before indexing.
ast.target: 使用 OCR 清理模型在索引前为块添加标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于聊天请求的兼容端点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a chat-capable model from the provider.
ast.target: 从提供商中选择一个支持聊天的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of recent messages to include for conversational continuity (0 disables).
ast.target: 为保持对话连续性而包含的最近消息数量（0 表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to open the chat view by default.
ast.target: 默认打开聊天视图的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Final number of retrieved chunks to keep before annotations and answer generation.
ast.target: 在生成批注和答案之前，最终保留的检索块数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a small planner step that can trigger expansion retry or full-document retrieval before answering.
ast.target: 使用一个小型规划步骤，可以在回答前触发扩展重试或全文档检索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of planner steps per query.
ast.target: 每个查询的最大规划步骤数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the chat model to expand queries before retrieval.
ast.target: 使用聊天模型在检索前扩展查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rewrite chat queries into standalone retrieval queries using recent chat history.
ast.target: 使用最近的聊天历史将聊天查询重写为独立的检索查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of expansion variants to request.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rerank candidates locally with sentence-transformers (downloads model on first use).
ast.target: 使用 sentence-transformers 在本地对候选结果重新排序（首次使用时下载模型）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a multilingual preset, or select custom to edit the model ID.
ast.target: 选择一个多语言预设，或选择自定义以编辑模型 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Retrieve k × n candidates before reranking.
ast.target: 在重新排序前检索 k × n 个候选结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rank fusion constant for blending lexical and vector results.
ast.target: 用于混合词法和向量结果的排名融合常数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log the top n rrf-ranked chunks to stderr (0 disables).
ast.target: 将前 n 个 RRF 排名的块记录到标准错误（0 表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit how many chunks from a single document can appear in retrieval (0 disables).
ast.target: 限制单个文档中可以出现在检索结果中的块数量（0 表示禁用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Switch to local interpreter/venv mode and enable advanced runtime settings.
ast.target: 切换到本地解释器/venv 模式并启用高级运行时设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write plugin logs to a file.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to write the log file. Keep inside the vault.
ast.target: 写入日志文件的位置。请保持在保险库内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the log file or clear it.
ast.target: 打开日志文件或清除它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Downloads the companion xpi to this plugin folder.
ast.target: 将伴侣 xpi 下载到此插件文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Launch Zotero and open the add-ons window (tools → add-ons).
ast.target: 启动 Zotero 并打开附加组件窗口（工具 → 附加组件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuild the redis index from cached chunk JSON files.
ast.target: 从缓存的块 JSON 文件重建 Redis 索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pulls the configured redis image and force-recreates the redis-stack service.
ast.target: 拉取配置的 Redis 镜像并强制重新创建 redis-stack 服务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuild missing notes using cached Zotero items and chunks.
ast.target: 使用缓存的 Zotero 条目和块重建缺失的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the current version splash screen.
ast.target: 打开当前版本的启动画面。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 高级 Python 运行时选项

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动分配 Redis 端口

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动启动 Redis Stack (docker/podman compose)

ast.target: 将 PDF 复制到保险库中

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 创建带 OCR 层的 PDF 副本

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 优先使用 Obsidian 笔记作为引文来源

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use Zotero companion for annotation images
ast.target: 使用 Zotero 伴侣获取批注图像

ast.name: setName
ast.target: OCR 决策（何时进行 OCR）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 低质量分块的模型清理

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 嵌入上下文片段大小（字符）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用交叉编码器重排序

ast.name: setName
ast.target: RRF 日志前 n 项

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每个文档的最大分块数

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 日志文件路径（相对于保险库）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从缓存分块重建 Redis 索引

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从缓存重建缺失的笔记

ast.source: Path to chat export template note
ast.target: 聊天导出模板笔记的路径

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Command ID to run after note creation
ast.target: 笔记创建后要运行的命令 ID

ast.source: Delete Zotero note and cached data
ast.target: 删除 Zotero 笔记及缓存数据

ast.source: Failed to fetch Zotero CSL from local API

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install the Zotero companion add-on to enable cached image/rect annotations. See tab Maintenance for instructions.
ast.target: 安装 Zotero 伴侣插件以启用缓存的图像/矩形标注。请参阅“维护”选项卡获取说明。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Map Zotero highlight colors to section headings and callout types.
ast.target: 将 Zotero 高亮颜色映射到章节标题和标注类型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No profiles yet. Add one below.
ast.target: 暂无配置文件。请在下方添加一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Download the xpi, then in Zotero go to tools → add-ons → install from file and restart.
ast.target: 下载 xpi 文件，然后在 Zotero 中转到工具 → 附加组件 → 从文件安装并重启。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This version includes improvements and fixes.
ast.target: 此版本包含改进和修复。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will drop the redissearch index (and embeddings) and rebuild it from cached chunks.
ast.target: 这将删除 redissearch 索引（及嵌入向量）并从缓存的块中重建。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This removes redis chunk keys that have no cached item.json or chunk files on disk.
ast.target: 这将移除磁盘上没有对应缓存 item.json 或块文件的 Redis 块键。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cache files are not deleted. Use this to clean up stale redis data.
ast.target: 缓存文件不会被删除。使用此功能可清理过时的 Redis 数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose which values to keep for each field.
ast.target: 为每个字段选择要保留的值。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 全部使用 Zotero 中的值

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose which version to keep for each annotation.
ast.target: 为每个标注选择要保留的版本。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 未找到已索引的 Zotero 笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Delete this message? This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 确定要删除此消息吗？此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Copy this chat to a new note
ast.target: 将此聊天复制到新笔记
